channel.title: TaskFlow Runtime on FsFlow
channel.description: Recent content in TaskFlow Runtime on FsFlow

item.title: RuntimeContext.cancellationToken
item.description:
Reads the cancellation token stored in a runtime context.

let cancellationToken (context: RuntimeContext<'runtime, 'env>) : CancellationToken

Parameters

  • context: The RuntimeContext to read.

Returns

The CancellationToken.

Information

  • Module: RuntimeContext
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.cancellationToken
item.description:
Reads the current runtime cancellation token.

let cancellationToken<'env, 'error> : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, CancellationToken>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.catchCancellation
item.description:
Converts an OperationCanceledException into a typed error.

let catchCancellation (handler: OperationCanceledException -> 'error) (flow: TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: RuntimeContext.create
item.description:
Creates a runtime context from the supplied runtime services, environment, and cancellation token.

let create (runtime: 'runtime) (environment: 'env) (cancellationToken: CancellationToken) : RuntimeContext<'runtime, 'env>

Parameters

  • runtime: The runtime services of type 'runtime.
  • environment: The application environment of type 'env.
  • cancellationToken: The CancellationToken.

Returns

A new RuntimeContext.

Information

  • Module: RuntimeContext
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.ensureNotCanceled
item.description:
Returns a typed error immediately when the runtime token is already canceled.

let ensureNotCanceled<'env, 'error> (canceledError: 'error) : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, unit>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: RuntimeContext.environment
item.description:
Reads the application environment half of a runtime context.

let environment (context: RuntimeContext<'runtime, 'env>) : 'env

Parameters

  • context: The RuntimeContext to read.

Returns

The application environment of type 'env.

Information

  • Module: RuntimeContext
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.log
item.description:
Writes a fixed log message through the environment-provided logger.

let log (writer: 'env -> LogEntry -> unit) (level: LogLevel) (message: string) : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, unit>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.logWith
item.description:
Writes a log message computed from the current environment.

let logWith (writer: 'env -> LogEntry -> unit) (level: LogLevel) (messageFactory: 'env -> string) : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, unit>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: RuntimeContext.mapEnvironment
item.description:
Maps the application environment half of a runtime context.

let mapEnvironment (mapper: 'env -> 'nextEnv) (context: RuntimeContext<'runtime, 'env>) : RuntimeContext<'runtime, 'nextEnv>

Parameters

  • mapper: A function of type 'env -> 'nextEnv.
  • context: The source context.

Returns

A new context with the mapped environment.

Information

  • Module: RuntimeContext
  • Source: source

item.title: RuntimeContext.mapRuntime
item.description:
Maps the runtime half of a runtime context.

let mapRuntime (mapper: 'runtime -> 'nextRuntime) (context: RuntimeContext<'runtime, 'env>) : RuntimeContext<'nextRuntime, 'env>

Parameters

  • mapper: A function of type 'runtime -> 'nextRuntime.
  • context: The source context.

Returns

A new context with the mapped runtime services.

Information

  • Module: RuntimeContext
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.retry
item.description:
Retries a flow according to the supplied policy.

let retry (policy: RetryPolicy<'error>) (flow: TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: RuntimeContext.runtime
item.description:
Reads the runtime half of a runtime context.

let runtime (context: RuntimeContext<'runtime, 'env>) : 'runtime

Parameters

  • context: The RuntimeContext to read.

Returns

The runtime services of type 'runtime.

Information

  • Module: RuntimeContext
  • Source: source

item.title: RuntimeContext
item.description:
Captures the two-context shape of a task workflow execution: runtime services, application capabilities, and the cancellation token for the current run.

type RuntimeContext<'runtime, 'env>

Remarks

This type is the standard environment carrier for TaskFlow. It separates low-level operational concerns (Runtime) from high-level domain dependencies (Environment).

Information

  • Module: Global
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.sleep
item.description:
Suspends the flow for the specified duration while observing cancellation.

let sleep<'env, 'error> (delay: TimeSpan) : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, unit>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.timeout
item.description:
Fails with the supplied error when the flow does not complete before the timeout.

let timeout (after: TimeSpan) (timeoutError: 'error) (flow: TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.timeoutToError
item.description:
Forwards to timeout for a typed failure on timeout.

let timeoutToError (after: TimeSpan) (error: 'error) (flow: TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.timeoutToOk
item.description:
Returns the supplied success value when the flow times out.

let timeoutToOk (after: TimeSpan) (value: 'value) (flow: TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.timeoutWith
item.description:
Runs a fallback flow when the original flow times out.

let timeoutWith (after: TimeSpan) (fallback: unit -> TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) (flow: TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: TaskFlow.Runtime.useWithAcquireRelease
item.description:
Acquires a resource, uses it, and always runs the release action.

let useWithAcquireRelease (acquire: TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'resource>) (release: 'resource -> CancellationToken -> Task) (useResource: 'resource -> TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : TaskFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: TaskFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: RuntimeContext.withEnvironment
item.description:
Replaces the environment half of a runtime context.

let withEnvironment (environment: 'nextEnv) (context: RuntimeContext<'runtime, 'env>) : RuntimeContext<'runtime, 'nextEnv>

Parameters

  • environment: The new application environment.
  • context: The source context.

Returns

A new context with the replaced environment.

Information

  • Module: RuntimeContext
  • Source: source

item.title: RuntimeContext.withRuntime
item.description:
Replaces the runtime half of a runtime context.

let withRuntime (runtime: 'nextRuntime) (context: RuntimeContext<'runtime, 'env>) : RuntimeContext<'nextRuntime, 'env>

Parameters

  • runtime: The new runtime services.
  • context: The source context.

Returns

A new context with the replaced runtime services.

Information

  • Module: RuntimeContext
  • Source: source
